prerequisites: A Financial Modeling Prep account. Register for free at https://site.financialmodelingprep.com/register.
An FMP API key, available from the dashboard after signing up (used for the required api_key field).
A start_date value (required) marking the earliest date from which to sync data.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Financial Modeling Prep authorizes every request with an API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. The connector passes the key as the apikey query parameter on each request. Generate or copy the key from the API Keys section of your FMP dashboard.

setupSteps.title: Create an FMP account
setupSteps.body: Register for a Financial Modeling Prep account at https://site.financialmodelingprep.com/register. A free plan is available to obtain an API key.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in and open your dashboard, then go to the API Keys menu. Copy the displayed key, or use the refresh control to generate a new one. All FMP API requests must be authorized with this key.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the key into the required api_key field. The connector authenticates by sending it as the apikey parameter on each FMP request.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync window
setupSteps.body: Set start_date (required) to the earliest date to pull data from. Optionally set time_frame to control the data interval/granularity.

setupSteps.title: Optionally filter the stock universe
setupSteps.body: To narrow which companies are pulled via FMP's company screener, optionally set exchange (limit to a specific exchange), marketcapmorethan (minimum market cap), and marketcaplowerthan (maximum market cap). Leave these blank for no filter.

sources.title: Financial Modeling Prep API Documentation (authentication via API key)
How to use Financial Modeling Prep API (apikey query parameter, keys on dashboard)
FMP FAQs (find/regenerate API keys from dashboard API Keys menu)
Stock Screener API (exchange, marketCapMoreThan, marketCapLowerThan filters)
